page_metadata.biotools__summary: Prepares pedigree data for calculation of Elston-Stewarts’ likelihood function. It finds an optimal way to peel a pedigree and returns text file containing 7 description arrays.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Prepares pedigree data for calculation of Elston-Stewarts’ likelihood function. It finds an optimal way to peel a pedigree and returns text file containing 7 description arrays.
